title: macaranga dioica
intro: Macaranga dioica, also known as the Tumu tree or Tumu, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Macaranga dioica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
